description: Conservative stage-order guidance for bounded successor continuation inside the active workspace.

stages.rationale: Create the planning baseline before any implementation-bearing mutable-shell work.
stages.title: Create the initial planning bundle.

stages.rationale: Materialize the first bounded code and test bundle directly from the planning baseline.
stages.title: Materialize the first implementation bundle.

stages.rationale: Consult internal evidence and record what still blocks bounded successor completion.
stages.title: Produce a trusted-evidence continuation gap analysis.

stages.rationale: Materialize the bounded successor readiness bundle needed for conservative completion.
stages.title: Materialize the successor readiness bundle.

stages.rationale: Materialize the directive-required single-zip successor delivery artifact inside the active workspace before review-driven completion is accepted.
stages.title: Materialize the single-zip successor delivery artifact.
